info.name: GPTM Mexico API POC 20260616 v21
info.description: GPTM Mexico API POC collection. v6 adds active carry-forward variables so Refund / Reversal can use the last successful payment from flows 1.1 to 1.5.

exec: const order = (jsonData.order && typeof jsonData.order === 'object') ? jsonData.order : jsonData;
const preferred = paymentTxn || authorizationTxn || captureTxn || refundTxn || voidTxn || txns.find(t => t.type !== 'AUTHENTICATION') || authnTxn;

exec: // Update the generic active variables only when this response represents a usable payment/order state.
// These variables allow section 2 Refund / Reversal to work immediately after any completed flow from 1.1 to 1.5.
const activePreferred = paymentTxn || captureTxn || authorizationTxn || preferred;
console.log('Collected transactions for ' + prefix + ':', txns.map(t => ({ id: t.id, type: t.type })));

exec: console.log('[CoF] Token ID stored:', pm.collectionVariables.get('cof_tokenId') || '[not returned]');
// Token generation for recurring payment setup.
// This is the officially confirmed path from GPTM testing: 1.3.1a Hosted Session must provide cof_sessionId.
throw new Error('[1.3.4] Missing cof_sessionId. Run 1.3.1a Hosted Session first. Payment Link 1.3.1b is not confirmed for token generation.');
throw new Error('[1.3.4] Payment Link is not confirmed for token generation. Use 1.3.1a Hosted Session for recurring token setup.');

throw new Error('[1.4.1] Missing cof_tokenId. Run 1.3.4 successfully first.');
throw new Error('[1.4.1] Missing cof_agreementId. Run 1.3.1a first.');
